new_order.title: New Order SMS
new_order.hint: Send SMS to customer when a new order is created
new_order.template:
Dear {{name}},

Your order has been confirmed.
Invoice: {{invoiceNumber}}.
Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
Thank you for shopping with {{storeName}}.

new_order.title: Edit Order SMS
new_order.hint: Send SMS when an order is edited
new_order.template:
Dear {{name}},

Your order has been updated.
Invoice: {{invoiceNumber}}.
Updated Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
Thank you for shopping with {{storeName}}.

new_order.title: Shipped Order SMS
new_order.hint: Send SMS to customer when order is shipped
new_order.template:
Dear {{name}},

Your order {{invoiceNumber}} is on the way.
Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
Thank you — {{storeName}}.

preorder.title: Preorder Created SMS
preorder.hint: Send SMS when customer creates a pre-order
preorder.template:
Dear {{name}},

Your pre-order is received.
Invoice: {{invoiceNumber}}.
Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
We will contact you soon — {{storeName}}.

preorder.title: Preorder to Pending SMS
preorder.hint: Send SMS when pre-order moves to pending
preorder.template:
Dear {{name}},

Your pre-order {{invoiceNumber}} is now pending confirmation.
Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
{{storeName}}

web_order.title: Web Order Received SMS
web_order.hint: Send SMS when a new web order is received
web_order.template:
Dear {{name}},

Your order has been confirmed.
Order ID: {{orderId}}.
Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
Thank you for shopping with {{storeName}}.

web_order.title: Reminder SMS
web_order.hint: Send reminder SMS for web orders
web_order.template:
Dear {{name}},

Reminder: order {{orderId}} ({{grandTotal}} BDT) is waiting.
Please confirm — {{storeName}}.

web_order.title: Advance SMS
web_order.hint: Send advance payment SMS for web orders
web_order.template:
Dear {{name}},

Advance payment received for order {{orderId}}.
Amount: {{grandTotal}} BDT.
Thank you — {{storeName}}.

quickTemplates.name: Order Confirm
quickTemplates.body: Your order has been confirmed. Thank you for shopping with us.

quickTemplates.name: Out for Delivery
quickTemplates.body: Your parcel is out for delivery. Please keep your phone reachable.

quickTemplates.name: Payment Reminder
quickTemplates.body: Reminder: your advance payment is still due. Please pay soon.
